channel.title: Auntie Cheryl on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Auntie Cheryl on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Auntie Cheryl: The New Nurse Rules Coming! And a Lovely Day in Chaguanas!
item.description:
Blessings and morning greetings to all my Chaguanas family and friends! Auntie Cheryl writing to you from my kitchen this Sunday morning, the breeze coming in through the louvre, the pot of sorrel on the stove, and the radio playing that new gospel from Pastor Winston that everybody have been sharing on the WhatsApp.

What a blessed Sunday! Let me tell you what is on my mind from the papers today.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl: Saddam Hosein Open a GYM!! TTMB Have New Mortgage for We!! And Nurses Saying Dey Going to WALK!!
item.description:
Allyuh!!! It me, Auntie Cheryl, and I wake up dis Saturday mornin’ with SO MUCH to tell yuh. De phone been ringin’ since 6AM, me sister in Diego Martin send me TEN voice notes, and me niece in Arima tell me to check de Guardian. Sit sit sit. Make tea. Let me unload.

SADDAM HOSEIN OPEN A GYM!!! 💪💪💪

Ohhhh darling this one had me LAUGHING.

Saddam Hosein — de MP for Barataria/San Juan — he cut de ribbon on a NEW GYM in Aranguez. Dey call it Raw Fitness. And dey TAKE PHOTOGRAPHS of him ON DE CHEST PRESS MACHINE.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl: Pension Tax Gone! De Procurement Watchman Doing He Wuk! And Lord Forgive Me, But De SoE Working Too!
item.description:
Oh Godddd it’s me Auntie Cheryl from Chaguanas coming to tell allyuh THE NEWS because I cannot hold it in another minute, my phone have 14 missed calls and 200 WhatsApp messages and people in de family is cryin’ happy cryin’ sad and cryin’ confused ALL AT DE SAME TIME and I will explain EVERYTHING.

Put on de kettle. Sit down. Let Auntie tell yuh.

DE PENSION TAX GONE!!!! 🙌🙌🙌

Darling. DARLING. Let me tell yuh what happen today.
